message.content:
Explore the existing personal website project at /Users/canerden/personal-website thoroughly. 

I need to understand:
1. The full file structure (src/, public/, pages/ or app/ directory)
2. What pages/components already exist
3. What the current design looks like (colors, fonts, layout in CSS/Tailwind config)
4. What content is already there
5. The package.json dependencies

Read the key files (index/home page, layout, main CSS, any existing components) and report back ALL the relevant code snippets so I can understand what's already built vs what needs to be added. This is a Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind v4 + TypeScript project.

content.text: I'll help you explore the personal website project thoroughly. Let me start by checking the file structure and understanding what's already there.
Let me get a better view of the project structure, excluding node_modules:
Perfect! Now let me read the key files to understand the structure:

content.text:
Perfect! I now have a complete understanding of the project. Let me provide you with a comprehensive report:

## Personal Website Project - Complete Analysis

### 1. FILE STRUCTURE

**Location:** `/Users/canerden/personal-website`

```
personal-website/
├── src/
│   └── app/
│       ├── layout.tsx        (Root layout)
│       ├── page.tsx          (Home page)
│       └── globals.css       (Global styles)
├── package.json
├── next.config.ts
├── tsconfig.json
├── README.md
└── next-env.d.ts
```

This is a minimal Next.js 16 app directory structure with only a single home page (no separate routes/pages directory).

---

### 2. PAGES & COMPONENTS EXISTING

**Single page:** Home page at `/src/app/page.tsx` containing all sections:
- Header introduction
- Current Bets section (Habitat, Habitat Skills)
- Previous Experience section (Rapider AI, Gobo, Koç Holding)
- Philosophy section
- Social links footer

All content is hardcoded inline with no separate components—everything is in one `page.tsx` file.

---

### 3. DESIGN & STYLING

**Color Scheme (CSS Variables):**
```css
--background: #ffffff (white)
--foreground: #000000 (black)
--muted: #737373 (neutral gray)
--border: #e5e5e5 (light gray)
```

**Typography:**
- Font: Inter (from Google Fonts via `next/font`)
- Assigned to CSS variable: `--font-geist-sans`
- Applied via antialiased body

**Layout & Spacing:**
- Max width container: `max-w-2xl` (Tailwind)
- Padding: `px-6` (horizontal), `pt-24 pb-32` (vertical)
- Margins: 16-20 unit spacing between sections
- Grid gap: 10 units between list items

**Typography Hierarchy:**
- H1: `text-2xl font-bold` (main title)
- H2: `text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em]` (section headers)
- H3: `font-bold` (item titles)
- Body text: `text-sm` with `.text-muted` class
- Meta text: `text-xs text-muted` (dates, descriptions)
- Footer: `text-[10px] text-neutral-300 uppercase`

**Interactive Elements:**
- Links use `group` hover states with `transition-colors`
- Arrow icons change from `text-neutral-300` to `black` on hover
- Underlines appear on hover with `underline-offset-4`
- Badges: `bg-neutral-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded uppercase`

---

### 4. CONTENT CURRENTLY PRESENT

**Header Section:**
- Name: "Can Erden"
- Bio: Growth and strategy operator pursuing Master's at Vlerick Business School
- Location: Leuven, Belgium
- Specialties: AI-native execution, M&A strategy, scaling early-stage ventures

**Current Bets (2 items):**
1. **Habitat** — Community-hackathons, 3 cities, 100+ MVPs launched
2. **Habitat Skills** — AI-native OS for founders, agents as strategic partners

**Previous Experience (3 items):**
1. **Rapider AI** (2024-2026) — Head of Growth & Strategy, 3.4x revenue scale, 56% cost reduction
2. **Gobo** (2024-2025) — Co-Founder, environmental intelligence/indoor air quality
3. **Koç Holding** (2023-2024) — Business Development, M&A

**Philosophy Section:**
- Belief in barrier collapse between idea and execution
- Focus on "Founder as Director" model using agentic AI

**Social Links:**
- Twitter, GitHub, LinkedIn, Email

---

### 5. DEPENDENCIES (package.json)

**Production:**
```json
"lucide-react": "^0.563.0"    (Icon library)
"next": "16.1.6"               (Framework)
"react": "19.2.3"              (React latest)
"react-dom": "19.2.3"
```

**Dev:**
```json
"@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4"   (Tailwind CSS v4)
"tailwindcss": "^4"
"@types/node": "^20"
"@types/react": "^19"
"@types/react-dom": "^19"
"typescript": "^5"
"eslint": "^9"
"eslint-config-next": "16.1.6"
"babel-plugin-react-compiler": "1.0.0"  (React compiler enabled)
```

---

### 6. KEY CODE SNIPPETS

**Layout File** (`layout.tsx`):
```tsx
import type { Metadata } from "next";
import { Inter } from "next/font/google";
import "./globals.css";

const inter = Inter({
  subsets: ["latin"],
  variable: "--font-geist-sans",
});

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Can Erden — Founder & Director",
  description: "Building tools and communities for the next generation of AI-native founders.",
};

export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: Readonly<{
  children: React.ReactNode;
}>) {
  return (
    <html lang="en">
      <body className={`${inter.variable} antialiased`}>
        {children}
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}
```

**Home Page** (`page.tsx`) — Data structure example:
```tsx
const experiences = [
  {
    company: "Rapider AI",
    role: "Head of Growth & Strategy",
    period: "2024 — 2026",
    description: "Led growth for an AI enterprise SaaS startup. Scaled revenue by 3.4x YoY through international GTM strategies and operational restructuring. Reduced operating costs by 56%.",
    link: "https://rapider.ai"
  },
  // ... more items
];

const currentBets = [
  {
    name: "Habitat",
    description: "Community-hackathons helping entrepreneurs launch startups...",
    link: "https://www.joinhabitat.eu/",
    tag: "Co-Founder"
  },
  // ... more items
];
```

**Styles** (`globals.css`):
```css
@import "tailwindcss";

:root {
  --background: #ffffff;
  --foreground: #000000;
  --muted: #737373;
  --border: #e5e5e5;
}

@theme inline {
  --color-background: var(--background);
  --color-foreground: var(--foreground);
  --color-muted: var(--muted);
  --color-border: var(--border);
}

body {
  background: var(--background);
  color: var(--foreground);
  font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

.text-muted {
  color: var(--muted);
}
```

**Config** (`next.config.ts`):
```tsx
const nextConfig: NextConfig = {
  output: 'export',           // Static export
  reactCompiler: true,        // React Compiler enabled
};
```

---

### SUMMARY

This is a **clean, minimal portfolio site** with:
- Single monolithic page component
- Minimal custom styling (mostly Tailwind + CSS variables)
- No separate component files
- Static content (no CMS or dynamic data)
- Static export configured (output: 'export')
- Icon library for social links
- Professional but simple design (white/black/gray palette)

The site is ready to be expanded with additional pages or components as needed. All infrastructure is in place for a modern Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind v4 + TypeScript project.
